hero.title: Welcome to Camp de Jésus Bel-Air Fizi
hero.subtitle: A church grounded in the sound doctrine of the Lord Jesus Christ — a community that forms, transforms, loves and lives by faith.
hero.quote: Christ in us, the hope of glory.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To form a generation of disciples deeply rooted in the Word of God, fervent in prayer, and committed to faithfully living and proclaiming the doctrine of Jesus Christ to all nations.

mission.title: What we do
items: Teach the doctrine of Jesus abundantly
Lead every child of God to a daily and consistent reading of the Bible
Develop a culture of intense and constant prayer
Send disciples to evangelize and plant churches

about.title: Camp de Jésus Bel-Air Fizi
about.p1_suffix: , the Bel-Air Fizi Church was born following a biblical conference organized by the School of Bible Readers — starting as a simple prayer cell bringing together two families.
about.p2_mid: , the work has grown to gather more than

testimonialsCta.title: God is still at work today.
testimonialsCta.body: Discover how lives have been transformed by the power of Jesus Christ.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Relive the memorable moments of our community

items.texte: Since joining this community, my life has been transformed. The Word of God is taught with clarity and depth. I truly feel at home here.
I found a sincere spiritual family here. The moments of prayer and intercession helped me go through difficult trials with the strength of God.
Camp de Jésus Bel-Air helped me grow in my faith. The teachings are practical, rooted in the Bible and applicable to daily life.
God healed me here — not just physically, but inwardly. This church truly believes in the power of the Holy Spirit and it shows.
As a young person, I found real spiritual guidance here. The youth department taught me to walk with God from an early age.
My marriage was going through a deep crisis. Thanks to pastoral support and the church's prayers, we found unity and peace in our home again.
I had been enslaved to alcohol for years. The day I accepted Christ in this church, my life radically changed. Today I am free.
The worship choir helped me discover my gift and serve God with joy. This is where I understood my calling.
